title: MCA Jobs 2026 – Non Teaching Positions
shortInfo: Indira Gandhi Institute of Development Research (IGIDR) has recruits 12 Non-Teaching Positions Posts. Candidates With Bachelor’s Degree, Master’s Degree, B.E./B.Tech., M.E./M.Tech., M.Sc., MCA, B.Com/Finance, Electrical Engineering, MLIS Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 15-05-2026, and closes on 08-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IGIDR website, igidr.ac.in.

basic_details.job_title: IGIDR Non-Teaching Positions Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indira Gandhi Institute of Development Research
basic_details.short_information: Indira Gandhi Institute of Development Research (IGIDR) has recruits 12 Non-Teaching Positions Posts. Candidates With Bachelor’s Degree, Master’s Degree, B.E./B.Tech., M.E./M.Tech., M.Sc., MCA, B.Com/Finance, Electrical Engineering, MLIS Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 15-05-2026, and closes on 08-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IGIDR website, igidr.ac.in.

application_fee.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India norms.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s Degree, Master’s Degree, B.E./B.Tech., M.E./M.Tech., M.Sc., MCA, Bachelor’s Degree in Commerce/Finance, Bachelor’s Degree in Electrical Engineering, Master’s Degree in Library and Information Science

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IGIDR to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for IGIDR Non-Teaching Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the IGIDR Various Non-Teaching Positions is 08 June 2026.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for IGIDR Non-Teaching Positions?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies announced for various non-teaching positions at the Indira Gandhi Institute of Development Research (IGIDR).

faq.question: What is the minimum qualification required for the Library Assistant post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Library Assistant post is a Master’s Degree in Library and Information Science with at least 55% marks or equivalent grade.

faq.question: What is the maximum age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Non-Teaching Positions at IGIDR is 40 years, with age relaxation applicable as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates for the IGIDR Non-Teaching Positions recruitment.

faq.question: What is the application mode for IGIDR recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the IGIDR Various Non-Teaching Positions is strictly online through the official IGIDR website.

faq.question: What is the salary structure for the Human Resource Officer post?
faq.answer: The Human Resource Officer post is offered a salary in Level 10, which ranges from ₹56,100 to ₹1,77,500 as per the 7th CPC Pay Levels.

faq.question: What is the selection process for IGIDR recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the IGIDR Non-Teaching Positions typically includes an Interview, Document Verification, and Tests.

faq.question: What is the official website of IGIDR?
faq.answer: The official website of Indira Gandhi Institute of Development Research (IGIDR) is www.igidr.ac.in.

faq.question: Where can I find the detailed IGIDR recruitment notification?
faq.answer: The detailed IGIDR recruitment notification can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article, under the Official Notification PDF link.
